
# Major Contemporary Theories of Consciousness

## Chapter Purpose

Explore IIT, Global Workspace Theory, Free Energy Principle, Orch-OR, and computational theories of consciousness.

## Suggested Topics

- 
- 
- 

## Suggested Figures or Tables

- 
- 
- 

## Key Questions

- 
- 
- 

## Notes

Add examples, references, equations, diagrams, case studies, or comparative discussions here.
